CHAPTER LIT. Christ's ministry and sufferings... wre hath believed. our. report? and to. whom is the arm of the Lord revealed ?

The beginning of this text has a double meaning as spoken by Abinadi: "Who hath believed our report, and to whom is the arm of the Lord revealed?" (Mosiah 14:1). Surely he was delivering a report. This query might be a common cry from every prophet who ever revealed to his people the coming of the Messiah. In this instance it is both Isaiah's and Abinadi's cries that may echo Christ's own lament…
